step_by_step_thinking:
I concur with agent1’s assessment. Fructose-2,6-bisphosphate not only activates phosphofructokinase-2 but also has an inhibitory action on hexokinase, further directing metabolites towards gluconeogenesis rather than glycolysis. Additionally, this molecule helps maintain higher intracellular concentrations of ATP which support energy-demanding processes such as gluconeogenesis without depleting other essential functions.

**Final Answer:** D A
